aboutPage.title: About MMKK AI
aboutPage.subtitle: The business technology partner behind growing companies in Myanmar and Thailand.
aboutPage.body1: MMKK AI was built to close a specific gap: businesses in Myanmar and Thailand need Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, HubSpot, Apollo, Google Cloud, and AI automation set up correctly and supported locally — not a generic offshore support ticket queue.
aboutPage.body2: We provide Google Cloud implementation and support and Microsoft cloud deployment services, combining hands-on platform experience with on-the-ground support across our offices in the US, Thailand, and Myanmar.
principles: Recommend the platform that fits your team, not the one we prefer to sell
No unverified claims — partner and certification status shown only once independently confirmed
Plain-language scoping before any implementation begins
aboutPage.trustBody: We don't publish partner badges or client logos we can't back up. Every technology relationship on this site is described exactly as it stands today - implementation service or verified partnership - and every case study or testimonial is published only with the client's permission.
aboutPage.trustPartnersLink: See our verified partner and platform status →
aboutPage.trustCaseStudiesLink: See case studies and client testimonials →

businessProblems.title: What is slowing your business down?
businessProblems.subtitle: Select the situation that sounds most familiar.

problems.label: Teams using personal email accounts
problems.problem: Staff communicate and store company files through personal Gmail or messaging accounts with no central oversight.
problems.outcome: Company email and files that belong to the business, managed from one admin console.

problems.label: Customer leads scattered across spreadsheets
problems.problem: Your sales team tracks opportunities in multiple spreadsheets with no shared view of the pipeline.
problems.outcome: One shared pipeline, clearer follow-up and better reporting.

problems.label: Repetitive manual administrative work
problems.problem: Staff spend hours a week on repetitive tasks like data entry, ticket triage or compiling reports by hand.
problems.solution: AI automation for defined, repetitive workflows
problems.outcome: Specific tasks automated, with time freed up for higher-value work.

problems.label: No clear sales pipeline
problems.problem: There is no consistent way to see which deals are active, which stage they are at, or what to follow up next.
problems.outcome: A defined pipeline stage for every deal and visibility for the whole team.

problems.label: Files and access permissions are difficult to control
problems.problem: It's unclear who has access to which files, and revoking access when someone leaves is a manual, error-prone process.
problems.outcome: Centralized access control, managed from one place rather than per-file.

problems.label: Business tools do not connect with each other
problems.problem: Your CRM, email, and reporting tools each hold a piece of the picture, with no data flowing between them.
problems.solution: Business workflow automation connecting existing tools
problems.outcome: Information flows between systems instead of being re-entered by hand.

solutionPlatform.title: The systems we implement, connected
solutionPlatform.subtitle: Illustrative interface previews - not vendor screenshots - showing how each product typically looks once configured.

google-workspace.name: Google Workspace
google-workspace.headline: Company email and files, properly governed.
google-workspace.body: Gmail, Drive, Meet and admin controls under your own domain, migrated from personal accounts on a staged basis.

microsoft-365.name: Microsoft 365
microsoft-365.headline: Outlook, Teams and SharePoint, deployed correctly.
microsoft-365.body: Tenant provisioning, licensing tier selection and governance so a Microsoft 365 rollout is organized, not just switched on.

hubspot-crm.name: HubSpot CRM
hubspot-crm.headline: One pipeline your team will actually use.
hubspot-crm.body: Deal stages matched to your real sales process, with data migration and live team onboarding included.
benefits: Pipeline configured to your sales process
Contact and company data cleaned on import

apollo.name: Apollo
apollo.headline: Outbound prospecting, targeted and tracked.
apollo.body: Ideal-customer filtering, sequence setup and deliverability configuration so outreach lands and gets replies.
benefits: Replies flow into your CRM as deals

ai-automation.name: AI Automation
ai-automation.headline: Specific, repetitive workflows automated.
ai-automation.body: One or two measurable workflows automated at a time, integrated into tools your team already uses.
benefits: Integrated into existing tools, not a new system
Clear escalation path for edge cases

google-cloud.name: Google Cloud
google-cloud.headline: Infrastructure, architected and cost-monitored.
google-cloud.body: Architecture design, migration and ongoing cost optimization so cloud spend stays predictable.
benefits: Compute, storage and networking sized to load
IAM and network security on least-privilege

systemsConnect.title: One connected business system, not separate licences
systemsConnect.subtitle: Choose a business objective to see the relevant part of the system.

captions.leads: Apollo builds and runs targeted outbound sequences that generate new leads from your ideal-customer profile.
captions.sales: Apollo replies flow into HubSpot CRM as tracked deals, giving sales a single organized pipeline.
captions.collaboration: HubSpot activity and customer context stay visible alongside Google Workspace or Microsoft 365, where your team already collaborates.
captions.automate: AI automation connects HubSpot, your workspace and reporting so repetitive follow-up and admin work runs without manual effort.
captions.cloud: Workspace and infrastructure move onto managed, monitored cloud accounts feeding a single management dashboard.

process.disclaimer: Estimated timelines are confirmed after technical scoping and depend on user count, data volume, integrations and migration complexity.

partnersPage.title: Partners, Platforms & Certifications
partnersPage.subtitle: A transparent look at exactly how MMKK AI relates to every platform mentioned on this site — what we implement, what we supply, and what has (and hasn't) been independently verified as an official partnership.
partnersPage.verifiedSubtitle: Relationships with an independently verifiable partner-program status, evidenced by a link to the vendor's own public partner directory.
partnersPage.verifiedEmpty: No vendor partnership currently meets this bar. MMKK AI implements and supports the platforms listed below, but does not hold an independently verified official partner, certified, or authorized reseller status with any vendor at this time. This section will be updated the moment that changes, with a link to the vendor's own directory listing as evidence.
partnersPage.platformsSubtitle: Software MMKK AI configures, deploys, and supports for clients. Using a platform professionally is not the same as an official partnership — see Verified Partnerships above for that distinction.
partnersPage.productsSubtitle: Licenses and products MMKK AI supplies directly to clients.
partnersPage.certificationsSubtitle: Individual or company-level certifications with a verifiable certificate reference.
partnersPage.certificationsEmpty: No vendor certification is currently documented with a verifiable certificate reference. This section will be updated once one is confirmed.
partnersPage.methodologyNote: Every entry on this page is checked against this same standard: a claim is only shown as verified when there is a link to public evidence behind it. If you have a question about any relationship shown here, or evidence we should review,

caseStudiesPage.title: Case Studies & Client Results
caseStudiesPage.subtitle: Verified examples of the work MMKK AI has delivered, published only once a client agrees to be named or described. Nothing on this page is invented.
caseStudiesPage.caseStudiesEmptyHeadline: Documented case studies are being prepared.
caseStudiesPage.caseStudiesEmptyBody: MMKK AI is compiling verified, client-approved case studies from completed implementation work. Rather than publish a placeholder or an unverifiable example, this section stays empty until a specific project has been reviewed and the client has agreed to have it described publicly.
caseStudiesPage.testimonialsEmptyHeadline: No client testimonials are published yet.
caseStudiesPage.testimonialsEmptyBody: MMKK AI only publishes a testimonial once the client has given explicit permission to be quoted by name. None have been collected and approved for publication at this time.
caseStudiesPage.methodologyNote: For a breakdown of exactly which technology relationships are independently verified versus which platforms MMKK AI simply implements,
